{{Quote|Help you I will, if take me you will.|Und'l|<ref name="P" />}}
'''Und'l''' was a stocky [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Buzchub]] with [[Color/Legends|blue]] fur. He was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on [[Harrandarr]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. He tended to waddle when he walked, and often perched an oversized hat at a jaunty angle on his head.

As he was incapable of speaking [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], he equipped himself with a [[Transliterator|translator]] which translated his speech in a mechanical voice. Und'l spoke in rhythm, often portraying that he knew more than he was revealing. He had a special affinity for [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], referring to them as his "long haired brothers". Und'l was proficient in beast riding.

Shortly after the fall of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Und'l worked with some Imperial sympathizers, recruiting adventurers to carry goods. On one such occasion, he recruited a party from the cantina on [[Roldalna]]. The job was to transport [[Spice/Legends|spice]] from [[Nigel VI]] to [[Lohopa II]], however the crates actually contained [[lexonite]], a deadly [[Poison/Legends|poison]] from Nigel VI. Possessing the poison was illegal on Nigel VI, with immediate execution the penalty. The poison was intended to be used by Imperial [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorists]] against the fledgling [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Und'l was unaware of the sinister nature of the package when he recruited the smugglers, but they held him responsible nevertheless.
